evals.name: basic-invocation
evals.prompt: Audit this repository using the repo-audit skill. Focus on CI and test enforcement.
evals.expected_output: A four-phase audit report with executive summary, file:line citations, severity ratings, and a task plan saved to reports/.
assertions: Output follows all four phases in order
Findings cite file paths or explicitly note unverified areas
Includes an A-F health grade with top risks and opportunities
Includes quick wins and milestone-ordered tasks
Does not propose modifying source code during the audit

evals.name: maturity-calibration
evals.prompt: Run repo-audit on a small weekend prototype. Do not recommend enterprise infrastructure unless justified.
evals.expected_output: Recommendations scaled to a prototype's maturity with explicit trade-offs on what not to fix.
assertions: Healthy dimensions are summarized briefly without padding
